description: Style NoteThis sheer white top from cool Danish brand, vero moda, is as stylish and chic as it gets. The knitted breathable fabric will keep you feeling comfortable and relaxed. Wear it with dark blue skinny denims for a look that epitomises style. Product DetailsWhite knit sheer top, has a scooped neckline, lace detail on the shoulders and sleeves, vertical lace panels in front, elasticated smocking at the hemline and comes with a detachable inner which has a netted front yoke with lace detailMaterial and Care65% polyester and 35% viscoseMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dry Use cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
